name: Proxmox VMA2RAW
description: Docker image to convert Proxmox VMA backup files to raw disk images mountable on Windows and Linux.

name: Bind9 Web Manager
description: All-in-one DNS solution for effortless management, replication, and user administration. Ships as a container.

name: Mail Relaying over DNS
description: Sets up a backup MX server that stores incoming emails if the primary server is offline and forwards them when it's back.

name: Dovecot Certificate Interface
description: Manages per-domain SSL certificates for Dovecot with ISPConfig integration, automation, and user management.
